---
title: "Ecosystem Comparison"
---

JuliaHealth provides tools for health data science, observational health research, and biomedical imaging in the Julia ecosystem. Researchers often rely on Python and R frameworks for similar workflows. This page highlights how key functionalities available in those ecosystems can also be achieved using Julia and the JuliaHealth ecosystem.

This comparison focuses on **functional capabilities**, rather than benchmarking performance.

### Observational Health Research (OMOP CDM)

| Functionality | Julia / JuliaHealth | R (OHDSI / HADES) | Python |
|---|---|---|---|
| Database connection to OMOP CDM | [OMOPCDMDatabaseConnector.jl](https://github.com/JuliaHealth/OMOPCDMDatabaseConnector.jl) | [DatabaseConnector](https://github.com/OHDSI/DatabaseConnector) | [ohdsi-python-client](https://github.com/OHDSI/ohdsi-python-client) |
| OMOP CDM data model handling | [OMOPCommonDataModel.jl](https://github.com/JuliaHealth/OMOPCommonDataModel.jl) † [HealthBase.jl](https://github.com/JuliaHealth/HealthBase.jl) | [OMOP Common Data Model](https://github.com/OHDSI/CommonDataModel) | [ohdsi-common](https://github.com/OHDSI/ohdsi-common) |
| SQL generation from cohort definitions | [OHDSICohortExpressions.jl](https://github.com/MechanicalRabbit/OHDSICohortExpressions.jl)† | [SqlRender](https://github.com/OHDSI/SqlRender) † [CirceR](https://github.com/OHDSI/CirceR) | [ohdsi-sqlrender](https://github.com/OHDSI/ohdsi-sqlrender) |
| Cohort creation | [OMOPCDMCohortCreator.jl](https://github.com/JuliaHealth/OMOPCDMCohortCreator.jl) | [CohortGenerator](https://github.com/OHDSI/CohortGenerator) | [ohdsi-cohort-generator](https://pypi.org/project/ohdsi-cohort-generator/) |
| Patient pathway analysis | [OMOPCDMPathways.jl](https://github.com/JuliaHealth/OMOPCDMPathways.jl)‡ | [TreatmentPatterns](https://github.com/OHDSI/TreatmentPatterns) | Limited native support |

### Epidemiology and Health Data Analysis

| Functionality | Julia | R | Python |
|---|---|---|---|
| Epidemiological modelling | [JuliaEpi](https://github.com/JuliaEpi)† ecosystem | [EpiModel](https://github.com/statnet/EpiModel) | [Epipy](https://cmrivers.github.io/epipy/) |
| Cohort feature extraction | [DataFrames.jl](https://github.com/JuliaData/DataFrames.jl) † [MLJ.jl](https://github.com/alan-turing-institute/MLJ.jl) (via [HealthBase.jl](https://github.com/JuliaHealth/HealthBase.jl)) | [FeatureExtraction](https://github.com/OHDSI/FeatureExtraction) | Limited native implementations |
| Patient-level prediction pipelines | [MLJ.jl](https://github.com/alan-turing-institute/MLJ.jl) workflows | [PatientLevelPrediction](https://github.com/OHDSI/PatientLevelPrediction) | [scikit-learn](https://scikit-learn.org/) |

### Biomedical Imaging and Signals

| Functionality | Julia | R | Python |
|---|---|---|---|
| MRI simulation | [KomaMRI.jl](https://github.com/JuliaHealth/KomaMRI.jl) | Limited support | [NiBabel](https://nipy.org/nibabel/) |
| Medical image reconstruction | [JuliaImageRecon](https://github.com/JuliaImageRecon)† ecosystem | [AnalyzeFMRI](https://cran.r-project.org/package=AnalyzeFMRI) | [DIPY](https://dipy.org/) |
| Medical image visualization | [MedEye3d.jl](https://github.com/JuliaHealth/MedEye3d.jl) | [oro.nifti](https://cran.r-project.org/package=oro.nifti) | [napari](https://napari.org/) |
| Physiological signal analysis | [DSP.jl](https://github.com/JuliaDSP/DSP.jl) † time-series tools | [biosignalEMG](https://cran.r-project.org/package=biosignalEMG) | [NeuroKit2](https://github.com/neuropsychology/NeuroKit) |

### Bioinformatics

| Functionality | Julia | R | Python |
|---|---|---|---|
| Bioinformatics workflows | [BioJulia](https://github.com/BioJulia)† ecosystem | [Bioconductor](https://www.bioconductor.org/) | [Biopython](https://biopython.org/) |

### Ecosystem-Level Tools

| Application | Julia | Python | R |
|---|---|---|---|
| Data manipulation | [DataFrames.jl](https://github.com/JuliaData/DataFrames.jl) | [pandas](https://pandas.pydata.org/) | [dplyr](https://dplyr.tidyverse.org/) |
| Visualization | [Makie](https://makie.org/) / [Plots.jl](https://github.com/JuliaPlots/Plots.jl) | [matplotlib](https://matplotlib.org/) | [ggplot2](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/) |
| Machine learning | [MLJ.jl](https://github.com/alan-turing-institute/MLJ.jl), [Flux.jl](https://github.com/FluxML/Flux.jl) | [scikit-learn](https://scikit-learn.org/) | [caret](https://cran.r-project.org/package=caret) |
| Numerical computing | Julia LinearAlgebra / SciML | [NumPy](https://numpy.org/) | base R |
| Notebooks | [Pluto.jl](https://plutojl.org/) / [IJulia](https://github.com/JuliaLang/IJulia.jl) | [Jupyter](https://jupyter.org/) | [RMarkdown](https://rmarkdown.rstudio.com/) |

### Notes

† Not an official JuliaHealth package.  

‡ Limited support.
